headline: IBM Expands AI Agents And Security Role With ElevenLabs And CrowdStrike
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has partnered with ElevenLabs to bring secure, multilingual voice AI agents to enterprise clients through its watsonx Orchestrate platform. The collaboration aims to support natural language AI interactions in more than 70 languages for global businesses with strict compliance needs. IBM also expanded its partnership with CrowdStrike to deliver AI powered, autonomous threat detection and response across security and IT environments. Both developments align with IBM's ongoing...

headline: IBM Quantum Computer Accurately Simulates Real Magnetic Materials, Reproducing National Laboratory Data
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced new results that its quantum computer can simulate real magnetic materials with results that match neutron scattering experiments, marking a significant step towards using quantum computers as reliable tools for scientific discovery. The work, reported in a pre-print, was conducted by scientists from the U.S. Department of Energy-funded Quantum Science Center at Oak Ridge National Laboratory, Purdue University, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Los Alamos N

content.title: IBM Quantum Computer Accurately Simulates Real Magnetic Materials, Reproducing National Laboratory Data
content.summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced new results that its quantum computer can simulate real magnetic materials with results that match neutron scattering experiments, marking a significant step towards using quantum computers as reliable tools for scientific discovery. The work, reported in a pre-print, was conducted by scientists from the U.S. Department of Energy-funded Quantum Science Center at Oak Ridge National Laboratory, Purdue University, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Los Alamos N

thumbnail.caption: “An IBM quantum computer-aided simulation of a neutron scattering experiment showed high agreement with the real-world results.” Lee, Y. T., et al. (2026). Benchmarking quantum simulation with neutron-scattering experiments. arXiv preprint arXiv: 2603.15608.

headline: Sol Rashidi, World’s First Chief AI Officer, Joins Agenda at FICO World 2026
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., March 26, 2026--Global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE:FICO) today announced that Sol Rashidi, the world’s 1st Chief AI Officer for Enterprise (2016) and a 2026 LinkedIn Top Voice, will deliver a keynote address at FICO® World 2026. Rashidi is a senior fellow at Harvard and a former AWS and Fortune 100 C-Suite exec who helped IBM launch Watson in 2011. Rashidi is a senior fellow at Harvard and a former AWS and Fortune 100 C-Suite exec who helped IBM launch Watson in 2011. headline: Quantum Computing Is on Its Way to Transforming Science. Inside IBM’s Latest Breakthrough.
summary: As the broader scientific community awaits the arrival of larger, more powerful quantum computers,  International Business Machines  and a cohort of researchers sought to prove that the systems are usable today.  A pre-print uploaded to arXiv Wednesday shows how IBM, alongside scientists at two national laboratories and three universities, was able to use a quantum computer to simulate a process imperceptible to the naked eye, but with applications in materials science.  In the end, the quantum processor was able to show how the crystal should behave.

In the end, the quantum processor was able to show how the crystal should behave.
